title: Elateriopsis macropoda
taxonomy: Elateriopsis macropoda is classified as a plant species in the family Annonaceae. This family is a part of the magnoliid group of flowering plants. The magnoliid group is a clade within the angiosperms, which are seed-producing plants. Elateriopsis macropoda is native to Southeast Asia, where it is found in the tropical forests. The species classification of Elateriopsis macropoda is subject to ongoing research and refinement.
